# Beatboxx

> Beatboxx is a free beatbox recorder app for iOS and Android, built by a beatboxer. Record ideas, auto-detect BPM, tag techniques, build routines, and prep for battles. Everything stays on-device — no accounts, no cloud, no tracking.

## About

- Platforms: iOS, Android
- Price: Free. No ads. No premium tier.
- Privacy: 100% on-device. ZIP export/restore. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no tracking.
- Built by: a beatboxer, for beatboxers.

## Core features

- Recording: high-quality audio capture purpose-built for beatbox.
- BPM auto-detection: 70–200 BPM with harmonic matching, re-detects after trimming.
- Metronome: 40–240 BPM, time signatures 2/4 to 20/4, tap-tempo, visual + audible beat.
- Smart tagging: tag by technique; search combinations like "technical + trap".
- Waveform scrubbing: precise navigation through recordings.
- Routine builder: assemble drops into routines and prep for battle rounds.
- Import: M4A, MP3, AAC, WAV, FLAC and more from Voice Memos or Files.
- Backup: full library export/restore via ZIP packages.
